notes: Work-tab rewire (Ship A of the WORK-TAB-REWIRE handoff; wiring only, no new cards/assets). The five Work-grid cards SOP/BOM/MANIFEST/PORT MAP/RACK MAP were routing through deploy_showOpsTool(tab), which has three defects: D1 silent-fail (dead tap, no feedback), D2 legacy nav poisoning (nav_push p:'sop' → on restore showPage('sop') runs showOpsTab() and resurrects the legacy #ops-tab-strip pill strip under body.rd — the confirmed on-device leak), D3 wrong BACK target (exited into the Deploy TOOLS grid, not the Work grid). FIX = 5 edits: (1) new redesign-only helper rd_openOpsTool(tab) placed after deploy_showOpsTool — switches to Work, drills out of the card grid, activates the wk-deploy subtab, renders the tool inline into #wk-deploy via deploy_opsHost() (never legacy #ops-content); on unknown tab it phantomToast()s + logs instead of dead-tapping; nav_push uses p:'work' (showPage('work') just activates #pg-work with NO showOpsTab, so no legacy leak — vs p:'sop'); BACK returns to the Work grid via the tool header's wk_showGrid(). (2) the 5 Work-grid card onclicks re-pointed deploy_showOpsTool→rd_openOpsTool (literal args, each unique; the Deploy TOOLS grid builds its onclick by concatenation so it is untouched and still uses deploy_showOpsTool). (3) D4 — MASTER DOC card relabeled SITE PROFILE / 'Facility config · AI context' (+aria-label); it always opened the Site Profile editor, the label was misleading. (4) D5 — pg-master's redundant 2nd Profile section pill hidden via one body.rd-scoped CSS rule (redesign already has its own Profile door; legacy keeps both pills). (5) 3-stamp bump. The helper's deps were verified against the live build (a 3-agent pass caught 8 bugs in the draft: phantomToast not toast, deploy_opsHost not bare getElementById, real showStab selector, ordering vs showMode which clears ops-detail/adds wk-grid, DEPLOY_TOOLS field names, _deploy_toolsBackHdr 2-arg, wk_showGrid). deploy_showOpsTool + showOpsTab + #ops-tab-strip + all legacy render paths UNTOUCHED → ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Command Center page frozen (not touched). NOT included: Ship B (shared-router legacy-leak gating) — parked pending John's explicit sign-off. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): Work grid still 10 cards, card 2 reads SITE PROFILE and still opens the profile editor + a save still writes; tap BOM/SOP/MANIFEST/PORT MAP/RACK MAP from Work → each opens inside the redesign frame (header + COMMAND/WORK/CRASH CART nav intact); in each, ‹ Back returns to the WORK grid (not Deploy Tools); after visiting 2-3 tools + spamming back / reopening, NO legacy pill strip appears; Deploy→TOOLS grid still works (unchanged, still deploy_showOpsTool); pg-master shows only ONE Profile door; MASTER FILE flow unchanged; ?legacy=1 byte-identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit.
